description_long: This is a small, modern civilian helicopter with a streamlined fuselage painted primarily in yellow and black. The helicopter features a bubble-shaped cockpit with large, clear windows providing excellent visibility for the pilot and passengers. It is equipped with a single main rotor and a tail rotor, both of which are slender and appear to be made of composite materials. The landing gear consists of two robust, gray skids attached to the underside of the fuselage, designed for stable ground contact. The tail boom is elongated and tapers towards the rear, supporting the tail rotor and a horizontal stabilizer. The overall design suggests a lightweight, agile aircraft suitable for urban air mobility or private transport.
description: A compact yellow and black civilian helicopter with a bubble cockpit, single main rotor, tail rotor, and sturdy gray landing skids.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the helicopter, including the main rotor, cockpit, skids, and tail boom.
description_view_1: Top-down view highlighting the main rotor span, cockpit roof, and the symmetrical placement of the landing skids.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the helicopter's profile, rotor, cockpit, and tail structure from the other side.
description_view_3: Bottom-up view focusing on the underside of the cockpit, the landing skids, and the lower structure of the tail boom.
attribute_rotor_blades: Two long, slender main rotor blades, likely made of composite material, colored black with no visible markings.
attribute_tail_rotor: Two-bladed tail rotor mounted vertically at the end of the tail boom, colored yellow with a red tip and no visible protective shroud.
attribute_landing_skids: Pair of straight, gray landing skids with rounded ends, made of metal or composite, attached to the fuselage with angled supports.
attribute_cockpit_windows: Large, curved bubble-style cockpit windows wrapping around the front and sides, clear with black framing, providing wide visibility.
